center.name: South West Tasmania
center.summary: South West Tasmania是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿啸鹟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive whistler (Pachycephala olivacea) or olivaceous whistler, is a species of bird in the family Pachycephalidae, the whistlers, that is native to southeastern Australia
